title: Work permit: Applying at a port of entry (POE) – After you get your work permit - Canada.ca
content:
Work permit: Applying at a port of entry (POE)

## After you get your work permit
Not applying at a POE?
Check if you can apply from outside Canada or at a inside Canada .
If your work permit is approved, you’ll need to apply for a Social Insurance number (SIN) and health insurance for yourself and your dependents. You may be able to extend your stay in Canada or apply for permanent residence.
- Social Insurance number (SIN)
- Extensions, studying and permanent residence (PR)

## Social insurance number (SIN)
You’ll need to get a SIN as soon as you arrive in Canada before you can start working.
Make sure that you and any dependants coming with you to Canada either have:
- provincial or territorial health insurance, or
- enough money in case you need medical attention
The eligibility rules for public health insurance vary by province and territory:
- Newfoundland and Labrador
- Northwest Territories
- Prince Edward Island

## Extensions, studying and permanent residence (PR)
- extend or change your work permit
- study while you work
- apply for permanent residence

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
